details: Paper PMC6146903 confirms 'Yield 74.8%; m.p 190-192°C' for Compound 5 (4-acetylthiosemicarbazone-4'-acetyldiphenyl sulphide). Compound, value, property type, source/DOI all match.

Paper ijms25126327 confirms 'White solid; yield 0.12 g, 25%; m.p. 202-203 °C' for compound 3 (4-ethyl-1-hydroxy-8,9,11-trimethyl-12H-6,12-methanodibenzo[d,g][1,3,2]dioxaphosphocine-2-carbaldehyde 6-oxide). All fields match.
Paper pharmaceutics12080741 confirms 'the drug melted at around 166 °C' for itraconazole (ITR). Quote, value, property and source match. DSC-measured.
Paper acsbiomedchemau.4c00060 confirms compound 5b 'Yellow solid (0.414 g, 95%), mp: 180-200 °C'. Long name in CSV matches paper's name. Value type, source, DOI all match.
Paper Molecules 2003, 8, 541-555 confirms 'Compound 7 was obtained as dark yellow crystals (85%), mp 245°C'. The 3,7-bis-(2-hydroxyphenyl)... compound 7 matches.
Paper ijms27052306 confirms compound 2e (carbohydrazide) 'M.p.: 125-130 °C' as white solid. Compound name structure matches (indeno-pyrrole-carboxamide skeleton).
Paper apb.2017.048 Table 2 confirms Piroxicam-saccharine sodium cocrystal 1:1 melting point 181-183 °C. Value, property, source, DOI all match.
Paper acsomega.6c01037 confirms compound 11 (succinimide derivative) '550 mg of 11 as a slightly orange solid (66%), mp 88-90 °C'. Quote, value match (en-dash vs hyphen minor).
Paper ijms27041716 confirms compound 24 'white solid (0.11 g, 65% yield). Mp 103-104 °C'. The penta-2,4-dienamide structure name matches.
Paper molecules31040699 confirms compound 5l '5-Acetyl-2-ethyl-4-[(4-methylisoxazol-3-ylmethyl)-amino]-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one... mp = 113-115 °C'. Full name and value match.
Paper molecules31040699 confirms compound 2p '5-Acetyl-2-ethyl-4-(4-nitrophenylamino)-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one... mp = 209-211 °C'. All fields match.
Paper 10.3390/60400300 confirms '2(N)-(2,2'-diamino-4,4'-dimethoxybenzophenone)-1,4-naphthoquinone (5b)... red prisms (from EtOH), m.p. 214°C'. Compound name and value match.
Paper ijms12042448 Table 5 confirms '27 2-me-2-butanol 6.4444 3.0353 102.0' as experimental boiling point at 1 atm. Compiled from literature - measured per Q3 allowance.
Paper molecules31040655 confirms compound 15 (N-(3-Fluorobenzyl)-6-chloro-4-hydroxy-2-quinolone-3-carboxamide) 'White powder (0.72 g) with yield 56%... m.p: 260-263 °C'.
Paper molecules31050844 confirms compound 5b '4-fluoro-5-(4-methylpiperazin-1-yl)benzene-1,2-diamine... M.P.: 79-81 °C'. Midpoint stored correctly. Compound name and value match.
Paper molecules30010199 Table 2 confirms Kaempferol Td = 631.97 K. Conversion 631.97 - 273.15 = 358.82 °C is correct. Decomposition property type.
Paper jps.24034 (Yalkowsky 2014) Table 1 confirms 'Benzamide 130 223'. Literature compilation but Q3 explicitly allows measured tag for literature compilations. DOI verified in paper.
Paper ijms27042032 confirms compound 8 (Triphenylphosphino-[1,3-diethyl-4-anisyl-5-(4-chlorophenyl)imidazole-2-ylidene]gold(I) tetrafluoroborate) 'colorless solid of m.p. 110 °C (dec.)'.
Paper molecules31040699 confirms compound 5c '5-Acetyl-4-[2-(3,4-dimethoxyphenyl)ethylamino]-2-ethyl-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one... mp = 111-112 °C'. All fields match.
Paper s13065-025-01402-8 confirms compound 10m 'yellowish-white precipitate... yield of 72%; mp 262-264 °C'. The 5,6-dichlorobenzimidazole derivative name matches.
Paper s-0036-1589496 confirms compound 6c (8-Ethoxy-1-methyl-1,12-dihydrochromeno[2',3':4,5]imidazo[1,2-a]pyrrolo[3,2-e]pyridine) 'Brown solid; yield: 0.058 g (36%); mp 149 °C'.
Paper acsomega.5c13222 confirms compound 2g (6-Chloroquinolin-2(1H)-one) 'A white solid; m.p. = 264-265 °C'. CSV quote slightly abbreviated but compound + value + source correct.
Paper ph19020239 confirms compound 5h '3,5-Diamino-4-[(3-Nitrophenyl)Diazinyl]-N-Tosyl-1H-Pyrazole-1-Carboxamide... Melting Point: 214-215 °C; light orange solid'. Name and value match.
Paper pharmaceutics2020136 Table 1 confirms TRIS diclofenac salt Tpeak = 209 °C ('Tris-methylol methane TRIS 220 418.15 209'). Measured (DSC). DOI verified in paper.
Paper 10.3390/81100756 Table 1 confirms compound 1e (3-(4-ethylphenyl)-2,2-dimethyl-1,2-dihydroquinazoline-4(3H)-thione) '1e C18H20N2S H 4-C2H5 187-188'. Name, substituent, value all match.
